AMV — the AI workforce · Now live, free to start

The AI that
does the work.

Most AI tools answer your question and stop. AMV does the actual work: it researches, builds, designs, writes, and ships the finished thing, and can keep running on a schedule. You hand off the goal. It hands back the result.

Buildapps, sites & designs

Agents that finish the job

Give AMV a goal and it works in the background, then brings back a finished result for you to approve.

Runs on a schedule, on its own

Daily market briefs, inbox triage, content drafts — set it once and AMV delivers every day without being asked.

Builds and ships real software

Apps and sites written and run in a live sandbox — debugged and previewed, not just pasted to you as text.

Connects to the tools you already use

Gmail, Calendar, Drive, GitHub, Slack — AMV reads, drafts, and acts inside your real accounts, with your sign-off.

How it works

Delegate. Approve. Done.

Review the finished work. Nothing sends or ships without your sign-off.

04

It keeps running

Put it on a schedule and the work just keeps arriving.

Pay per tool

Independent of any single model — AMV picks the right engine for each job, so you always get the best result without choosing.

Built to trust

Your work, kept private and in your control.

No hidden charges and no selling your data. You stay in control of what AMV does and what it keeps.

Private by default

Your chats and memory live in your account, never sold or shared. Optional analytics only run if you accept them.

Nothing acts without your sign-off

AMV drafts, builds, and prepares — but sending, publishing, and shipping always wait for your explicit approval.

Secure payments via Stripe

We never see or store your card. Checkout runs on Stripe, the same infrastructure trusted by millions of businesses.

Cancel anytime, keep your data

No lock-in. Export everything you've made in one click, and downgrade to a free account whenever you like.

Data encrypted in transit Stripe-secured checkout 30-day money-back guarantee No ads, ever
Pricing

One subscription. A whole AI workforce.

One plan covers research, building, design, and running your work. It costs less than most AI subscriptions and actually does the job instead of just chatting.
